founder.name: Lena Fischer
founder.bio: Data engineer turned founder. Building a customer-analytics layer for B2B SaaS.

company.name: Cohortiq
company.one_liner: Warehouse-native cohort and retention analytics with an LLM query layer.

content.text: Big week at Cohortiq - we just crossed 40 enterprise customers. Retention analytics is eating the world.
content.author: lenafischer

content.note: Diligence: CRM export shows 3 design partners, none paying, no signed contracts. The public '40 enterprise customers' claim is unsupported.
